description_long: This is a modern, freestanding bathtub with a smooth, oval exterior and a gently sloped interior designed for comfort. The bathtub is constructed from a glossy, white material, likely acrylic or porcelain, giving it a sleek and clean appearance. Its sides are slightly flared, and the rim is thin and even all around, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The interior is deep and spacious, suitable for full-body immersion, and a drainage hole is visible at one end. There are no visible faucets, handles, or decorative elements on the exterior, emphasizing its contemporary style. The bathtub's surface is highly reflective, indicating a polished finish.
description: A sleek, white, freestanding bathtub with a glossy, smooth finish and a minimalist, oval design. The tub features a deep, spacious interior and a visible drainage hole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval opening, sloped interior, and smooth, seamless exterior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, symmetrical shape and thin rim of the bathtub.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same oval opening and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the drainage hole at one end and the bathtub's full length.
